details.test: Task 1 - Apply for Software Engineer in New York with salary filter
Task 2 - Create weekly Marketing Manager alert in London with salary range
Task 3 - Compare two Software Engineer jobs and save the higher-paying one
Task 4 - Create or update candidate profile with skills, locations, and salary expectations
Task 5 - Save up to three Software Engineer jobs and open saved jobs list
Task 6 - Schedule earliest afternoon interview next week for Data Analyst application
Task 7 - Ask recruiter about parental leave benefits via contact form
Task 8 - Filter visa-sponsored roles, mark two as not interested, and open remaining job
Task 9 - Use salary estimator for Senior UX Designer in Berlin and create matching alert
